alt_text: CycleGAN. Two models are trained simultaneously. The first $c' = g[c_j, \theta]$ translates from an image

text: Figure 15.18 CycleGAN. Two models are trained simultaneously. The first $c' = g[c_j, \theta]$ translates from an image c in the first style (horse) to an image $c'$ in the second style (zebra). The second model $c = g'[c', \theta]$ learns the opposite mapping.
Draft: please send errata to udlbookmail@gmail.com.
